item.title: LogicGrid 11.0.0
item.description:
LogicGrid 11.0.0

Time signature support. LogicGrid now reads your project's time signature directly from Logic's LCD and adjusts the grid accordingly. Supports 2/4, 3/4, 4/4, 6/8, and 9/8. If your LCD doesn't show Time Signature, you can pick your project's signature manually from the new Time Signature menu, or right-click Logic's LCD → Customize Control Bar and Display to enable it.

Also includes performance improvements (reduced AX traffic to Logic in spotlight modes) and a fix for the grid drawing on top of Settings, Welcome, and Bug Report windows.
